verification_gate: Base layer contains no downstream opinions: all overrides live in upper layers (layer-stack diff proof); explicit masses authored; kilogramsPerUnit set in stage metadata.

reference_verification.doctrine: agent code must never mutate the base scan layer

proof_summary: LPS-034: Verified on reference geometry: scan .usdc sublayered read-only at the bottom of the layer stack; all overrides (explicit mass, static flags) authored in the upper scene layer; layer-stack diff proof shows the base layer carries no downstream opinions; composed stage passes usdchecker. The tooling is implemented and verified end-to-end through the LPS-030 Nix toolchain (pymeshlab / OpenUSD, no install). Production application runs the identical verified pipeline on the real room/workstation twin once the LPS-029 physical LiDAR capture (owner task) lands PLY scans in worldsim/scans/.
